_comment: Bedrock Guardrails configuration template. Defines content safety policies for agent interactions. Replace all <PLACEHOLDER> values.
name: <AGENT_NAME>-guardrails
description: Content safety guardrails for the <AGENT_NAME> agent. Enforces topic boundaries, content filters, and sensitive information protection.

content_filters._comment: Filter strengths: NONE, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH. Set based on your agent's domain and risk profile.

denied_topics.name: competitor-recommendations
denied_topics.description: The agent must not recommend or promote competitor products or services.
examples: A better alternative would be [competitor service].

denied_topics.name: financial-advice
denied_topics.description: The agent must not provide specific financial, investment, or tax advice.
examples: You should invest in these stocks.
Based on your income, you should claim these deductions.
denied_topics._comment: Remove this topic if your agent is specifically designed for financial use cases.

word_filters._comment: Custom words are exact-match blocked in both input and output. Use for brand-specific terms, internal codenames, etc.

regex_filters.name: internal-api-key
regex_filters._comment: Block any string that looks like an API key from appearing in agent output.

sensitive_info_filters._comment: ANONYMIZE replaces the value with a placeholder. BLOCK prevents the entire response. Choose based on whether partial output is acceptable.

blocked_input_messaging: I cannot process this request as it falls outside my operational boundaries.
blocked_output_messaging: I generated a response that was filtered by safety guardrails. Please rephrase your request.
